message.content: {"cases":[{"input_lines":["[\"Stable\"]","[\"Risky\", \"Safe\"]","{\"Stable\": {\"Risky\": {\"Stable\": 1.0}, \"Safe\": {\"Stable\": 1.0}}}","{\"Stable\": {\"Risky\": 5, \"Safe\": 5}}","0.95","1e-6"],"focus":"Single-state self-loop with two actions that yield identical returns to test tie-breaking (choose first action) and single-state value computation."},{"input_lines":["[\"Active\", \"Dormant\", \"Exit\"]","[\"Invest\", \"Divest\"]","{\"Active\": {\"Invest\": {\"Dormant\": 1.0}, \"Divest\": {\"Active\": 1.0}}, \"Dormant\": {\"Invest\": {\"Exit\": 1.0}, \"Divest\": {\"Dormant\": 1.0}}, \"Exit\": {\"Invest\": {\"Exit\": 1.0}, \"Divest\": {\"Exit\": 1.0}}}","{\"Active\": {\"Invest\": 10, \"Divest\": 2}, \"Dormant\": {\"Invest\": -1, \"Divest\": 0}, \"Exit\": {\"Invest\": 0, \"Divest\": 0}}","0.99","0.0001"],"focus":"Deterministic transitions with an absorbing zero-reward state and mixed positive/negative rewards; high gamma to exercise propagation and convergence behavior."},{"input_lines":["[\"S1\", \"S2\", \"S3\"]","[\"Hold\"]","{\"S1\": {\"Hold\": {\"S1\": 0.3333333, \"S2\": 0.3333333, \"S3\": 0.3333333}}, \"S2\": {\"Hold\": {\"S1\": 0.3333333, \"S2\": 0.3333333, \"S3\": 0.3333333}}, \"S3\": {\"Hold\": {\"S1\": 0.3333333, \"S2\": 0.3333333, \"S3\": 0.3333333}}}","{\"S1\": {\"Hold\": 0}, \"S2\": {\"Hold\": 5}, \"S3\": {\"Hold\": -2}}","0.5","1e-8"],"focus":"Single-action MDP with floating-point transition sums (0.9999999) to test tolerance handling and propagation with sparse/non-integer probabilities."}]}
